title: Backend Developer Vacancy at NIIT - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at NIIT - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at NIIT. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Backend Developer to strengthen our Kolkata-based team.

About NIIT:
NIIT is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIIT!
